case_title: SHARPER IMAGE CREDIT CARD TRANSACTION CASES

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO DEFENDANT SHARPER IMAGE'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR COORDINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAIR, JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA

MOTION FOR COORDINATION IS CONTINUED TO OCT-24-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN 304 FOR FURTHER HEARING. POSSIBLE THIRD ACTION (RYAN V. SHARPER IMAGE, LOS ANGELES NO. BC358994) MAY BE ADDED ON. NOTICE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK JOSE RIOS-MERIDA, REPORTER IRENE BURNS, D-304.
ORDER ASSIGNING COORDINATION MOTION JUDGE AND SETTING HEARING

COMPLEX LITIGATION 304, MOTION FOR COORDINATION IS GRANTED. THE LOS ANGELES CASE, RYAN V. SHARPER IMAGE CORP., BC358994, IS DEEMED COMPLEX AND APPROPRIATE FOR COORDINATION. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. THE COURT RECOMMENDS SAN DIEGO SUPERIOR COURT FOR ASSIGNMENT OF THE COORDINATED CASES. THE COURT STAYS THE CASES UNTIL FURTHER ORDER FROM AN APPROPRIATE COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK FELICIA GREEN, COURT REPORTER IRENE BURNS, DEPT. 304
